statement: In every magma, Equation 1715 (`x = (y * x) * ((z * w) * z)`) implies Equation 374 (`x * y = (x * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0289
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op z w) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op x x) x)
